hooks.command: file=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oP '"file_path"\s*:\s*"\K[^"]+'); if echo "$file" | grep -q '\.kt$'; then module=$(echo "$file" | grep -oP 'nimbus-[^/]+' | head -1); if [ -n "$module" ]; then cd /mnt/e/DEV/Minecraft/Nimbus && ./gradlew ":${module}:compileKotlin" --daemon -q 2>&1 | tail -20; fi; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qP 'git\s+commit'; then echo 'PAUSE: Run /pre-commit-docs check before committing. Verify docs/ and CLAUDE.md are in sync with your changes.'; exit 2; fi
